description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a single test stage (default) and add jobs api_fuzzing, cluster-image-scanning, container-scanning, coverage_fuzzing, dast, dast-with-details, sam_scan, sast-eslint, sast-pmd-apex, sast-sobelow, sast-spotbugs, and secrets, each running the script `echo NOOP` and publishing a specific report artifact (e.g., api_fuzzing → samples/api-fuzzing.json, cluster-image-scanning → samples/cluster-image-scanning.json, container-scanning → samples/container-scanning.json, coverage_fuzzing → samples/coverage-fuzzing.json, dast → samples/dast.json, dast-with-details → samples/dast-with-details.json, sam_scan → samples/samscan-report.json, sast-eslint → samples/sast-eslint.json, sast-pmd-apex → samples/saat-pmd-apex.json, sast-sobelow → samples/saat-sobelow.json, sast-spotbugs → samples/sast-spotbugs.json, secrets → samples/secret-detection.json). Include the built‑in Dependency‑Scanning template via `include: - template: Jobs/Dependency-Scanning.latest.gitlab-ci.yml`. No caches, variables, rules, or deployment targets are defined.
